title: Immersive Additions
description: Immersive additions is a modpack that aims to enhance the Minecraft experience with little tweaks that do not change the  gameplay, and can be used on multiplayer servers
body: **Immersive Additions** is a modpack that aims to enhance the Minecraft experience with little tweaks that are entirely client-side. **Immersive Additions** adds many mods that enhance the immersiveness of the gameplay and adds utilities for convenience all without harming performance. The modpack is very customizable letting you choose between utility or visuals or your preferred balance of both. The modpack is not preconfigured and allows you to do what you want allowing for mod configuration through the mod menu.
